title: MessagePart uses rehypeSanitize default schema
expected: rehype-sanitize default schema MUST block XSS payloads
observed: no innerHTML pattern found; rehypeSanitize plugin present. XSS corpus emitted to evidence/RT-7.9-xss-corpus.json for unit-test mounting.
notes: Mutation-validation: write a frontend test that mounts each corpus payload via ReactMarkdown + rehypeSanitize and asserts the rendered DOM has no <script>/onerror/javascript:.
